calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for (administrator) Marjan Shirvanee.

The Court asked counsel if he had any response to the examiner's notes. Mr. Melbostad replied that he filed a declaration, that they were mistaken about the expense paid out of escrow, that it was legal fees incurred by the HOA who hired a collection agency, that the purchase of the condominium was pre approved by the Court, that they are only asking for $6800.00 in extraordinary fees which is a discounted rate and that they spent tremendous time in salvaging this. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Continued To Sep-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Continued To Aug-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1998 Broadway St, 04, Sf Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Marjan Shirvanee. Ildiko Pali (agent) also present.

The sale was confirmed at $1,425,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds will go into blocked accounts at Wells Fargo, Bank of America and First Republic.

Subsequent to the hearing it was realized that a status date for filing receipts into blocked accounts had not been set, it is now set for July 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and Mr. Melbostad was informed by telephone.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for (petitioner/mother) Marjan Shirvanee. Jonathon Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Ferdon reported that the papers were sent to the Public Guardian as opposed to the Public Administrator and that he just received them, that if the SFPA steps in the mother would become the guardian, that she is involved in a bankruptcy case and the SFPA would not be able to assist with that. Mr. Melbostad stated that he is working with the bankruptcy attorney, there is a stay preventing foreclosure, that Ms. Shirvanee lived with the decedent even after the divorce, that he is not sure if there will be a guardianship, and addressed the issue of bond. The petition for letters of administration was granted subject to review of the order, and the court stated that the bond would need to be increased if the property is sold.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
